narrative:
North Twp/Vil (precinct in Harrison County) has 892 registered voters, with 62.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a clear Republican lean of 8.5 percentage points.
